title: Seshat BI agent-control status surface
description: The stable JSON contract for `retail status --format json` (spec 109, roadmap M4, Option B). A READ-ONLY projection of the committed `mappings/*/readiness-status.yaml` state -- categorical status + named evidence/blockers only, never a numeric confidence/health/maturity score (Principle V).

tables.description: One entry per committed mappings/<table>/readiness-status.yaml. Empty when no readiness-status.yaml is committed (a fresh repo) -- NOT an error.

status.description: Categorical status only -- never a numeric score (hard rule #9, Principle V).

table.description: The table identity from readiness-status.yaml's `table` field.

source_path.description: Repo-relative path of the readiness-status.yaml this entry projects (evidence of provenance, not new logic).

current_stage.description: The committed current_stage; null if the source file omits it.

stages.description: Per-stage projection, keyed by stage name (e.g. mapping_ready). Only stages present and well-formed in the source file are projected.

blocking_reasons.description: Top-level (cross-stage) blocking_reasons rollup from the committed file.

next_action.description: The committed next_action; null if the source file omits it.
